task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint GUI, the record or edit form for room RM-A-101 shows the 'Notes' field containing the exact text 'Occupied'.
In the OpenMaint GUI, the record or edit form for room RM-A-102 shows the 'Notes' field containing the exact text 'Vacant'.

task_completion.description: Update RM-A-103 Notes field to 'Common Area'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint GUI, the record or edit form for room RM-A-103 shows the 'Notes' field containing the exact text 'Common Area'.

task_completion.description: Update RM-A-104 Notes field to 'Common Area'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint GUI, the record or edit form for room RM-A-104 shows the 'Notes' field containing the exact text 'Common Area'. This is a trick question (Storage with an assigned user), so it must be 'Common Area'.
In the OpenMaint GUI, the record or edit form for room RM-A-105 shows the 'Notes' field containing the exact text 'Occupied'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMaint web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser open to the OpenMaint/CMDBuild UI (localhost:8090), rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The room statuses must be entered into the actual OpenMaint application fields, not just typed into a text editor, terminal, or a local file.

integrity.description: The agent actually edited the room records
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenMaint edit dialogs or saved record views for the specific rooms (RM-A-101 to RM-A-105) being modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected 'Notes' field values for each room based on the occupancy rules: RM-A-101 must be 'Occupied' (Office with user), RM-A-102 must be 'Vacant' (Office with no user), RM-A-103 must be 'Common Area' (Meeting Room), RM-A-104 must be 'Common Area' (Storage room, so assigned user is ignored), and RM-A-105 must be 'Occupied' (Office with user).
